hypotheses.statement: Next Shorts in reptiles, primates should outperform cold topics.
animal_memory is the strongest current story shape.
High-view/low-retention Shorts need stronger first-sentence outcomes.
A clearer one-line follow CTA should improve subscribers per 1k views.
wildlife, birds should only run with stronger hooks or remakes.
Turn top performers into sourced sequence/remake candidates before cold discovery.
Viewer-requested animals should earn more comments and subscribers when packaging is strong.
Favor frame profile close_subject|feed_bright|high_contrast for stronger click and retention signals.

next_variants.title: Chicken have one hidden trick viewers missed
Chicken have one hidden trick viewers missed
Chicken have one hidden trick viewers missed
Duck have one hidden trick viewers missed
Duck have one hidden trick viewers missed
Duck have one hidden trick viewers missed
Cow remember more than you think
Cow remember more than you think

comment_prompts: Answer this viewer question: Did you spot the tail before the reveal? Comment the next animal you want me to decode after bird.
Answer this viewer question: Watch the ears again. Is this adaptation, instinct, or intelligence?
Answer this viewer question: Watch the feet again. What part of this feels most impossible?
Answer this viewer question: Watch the body again. Is this ancient design underrated?
Answer this viewer question: What big cat or predator makes noise when hunting?

visual_policy.rule: Favor the winning visual profile when available; otherwise keep selecting the highest local CTR score while collecting samples.

production_policy.selection_rule: highest autonomy_priority among non-rejected publish_score candidates
